title: Principal Frontend Developer at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates!
